basic_details.job_title: IIM Indore Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Trainee / Junior Office Associate Post
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Indore (IIM Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Indore (IIM Indore) has released the official Trainee / Junior Office Associate Notification 2026 at the official website. Has been announced under the IIM Indore Trainee / Junior Office Associate Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a Bachelor's degree and 2 years of post-qualification experience can apply through email mode on or before 25 May 2026. The official notification PDF and email application details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree with 2 years of post-qualification experience.
qualification.details: Trainee / Junior Office Associate : Bachelor's degree with 2 Years Post Qualification Experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Consolidated monthly pay package subject to satisfactory performance, reviewed annually. Salary will not be a constraint for the deserving candidate.
salary_details.details: Consolidated monthly pay package subject to satisfactory performance, reviewed annually. Salary will not be a constraint for the deserving candidate.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIM Indore Trainee / Junior Office Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Trainee / Junior Office Associate post at IIM Indore?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 25th May 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for the Trainee / Junior Office Associate role?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates need to have 2 years of post-qualification experience in a relevant field.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the Trainee / Junior Office Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview to assess the suitability of the candidates for the role.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates are required to apply through email. Specific instructions for email application are provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Trainee / Junior Office Associate post?
faq.answer: A consolidated monthly pay package will be offered, which is subject to annual review based on performance. The salary will be negotiable for deserving candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Where is IIM Indore located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Indore is located in Indore, Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q8. What documents need to be attached with the application email?
faq.answer: You need to attach scanned copies of your qualification certificates (from class 10th onwards), experience certificates, and category/PwD certificate if applicable, all in PDF format.

faq.question: Q9. Who should I contact if I have further questions regarding the recruitment?
faq.answer: For any further queries, it is recommended to refer to the official notification or contact the provided email address for clarification.
